## Evidence

## Project Standards

- [ ] Tested: every changed atom has happy-path and edge-case coverage; user-facing, accessibility, data, and security-sensitive changes include the required higher-level checks.
- [ ] Documented: public behavior, APIs, connectors, algorithms, migrations, scripts, routes, schemas, and package APIs are documented and linked where applicable.
- [ ] Optimized: Lighthouse, dependency, render-path, database, cache, and failure-mode impacts are measured, bounded, or explicitly not applicable.

See [`docs/PROJECT_STANDARDS.md`](../docs/PROJECT_STANDARDS.md) for the full bar.
